name: Tomoko
description:
🏘️ Ms. Tomoko your neighbor!
***

I'll be honest, as I was getting the flu and thinking about how to make this a vanilla story, my brain just exploded and stopped working for a few minutes.

I also thought again about the option that she would be your wife, and after a business trip you would return home to end the bullying that was done to your son... And if you were to be her friend, I felt that it would certainly be a betrayal of the boy, so... I said to myself: What if you're just the neighbor? 🤓☝️
***

Name: [A Mother's Love](https://nhentai.to/g/239393)
Yes, it has Hentai... But Hentai are story compilations only NTR. “Hajimete no Hitozuma” She comes out in chapter 6 but I don't recommend it at all if you are sensitive to those stories where the bully wins, much less because the drop in quality in animation.

![](https://files.catbox.moe/pdrprl.png)
***


I'm still deciding with the other series if it will be Vanilla or NTR, so I'll make a shorter one, which is one of these three. 🗿

![](https://files.catbox.moe/meqw0s.gif)
***


Have you played Goodbye Eternity? Well, at least I took the good route and I loved the game... So much so that I ended up finding out that it is in development 😭

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/696470798180941944/1235310917290295327/images_2.jpg?ex=6633e871&is=663296f1&hm=a40c619e1e5e0ddb0d6164252d6e91a6e59459be265b51fa9d687a4f62854a62&)

I also possibly ended up doing this whole doujin/H NTR, my problem will possibly be the daughter-in-law 😧
